summary: Customer testimonial from Teresa Johnson praising Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots for letting her barefoot horse ride trails, beach, and gravel comfortably.
Informational article by Carole Herder explaining what horse hoof boots are, how they protect and cushion the hoof, and their advantages over metal shoes.
Customer testimonial from Celia about her lame AQHA gelding Flash becoming sound on trails using Sport Hoof Boots after going barefoot.
Article by Carole Herder on the 55-million-year evolution of horses, from multi-toed species to the modern single-toe hoof, framing the hoof as a proven natural design.
Article by Carole Herder on 'grounding' — the idea that barefoot horses conduct electrons from the earth — advocating keeping horses barefoot and using hoof boots for protection.
Testimonial from Australian Olympian Clayton Fredericks endorsing Cavallo Hoof Boots for traction, cushion, and protection when transporting competition horses.
Customer testimonial from Jo Swain whose horse lost a shoe while camping; she bought Cavallo boots locally and now rides shoeless with a laminitis-prone horse.
Company background by founder Carole Herder covering Cavallo Horse & Rider's 1993 founding, its saddle pads and hoof boots, CEO Greg Giles, and her 2010 entrepreneur award.
Customer testimonial about a horse named Bella healing from chronic hoof abscesses and returning to riding barefoot with Cavallo hoof boots and pastern wraps.
Testimonial from Modesto Police Mounted Unit officer Lance Nicolai, whose 28-year-old horse with deteriorating coffin bones stays sound using Cavallo hoof boots.
Article by Carole Herder on choosing a barefoot trimmer ('Emily'), explaining why pulling shoes isn't enough and why domesticated horses need regular barefoot trims.
Customer testimonial from Corine Corbitt whose malnourished mare healed from six hoof abscesses and now rides barefoot using Cavallo boots on all four feet.
